title: viola montana var. elatior
intro: Viola montana var. elatior, also known as the alpine pansy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is a perennial plant with heart-shaped leaves and purple flowers, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Viola montana var. elatior include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic, and it is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses.
